projects.title: Checking the bacterial contamination in drinking water by testing sulphide ion
projects.details: Scientific investigation involving laboratory testing to detect sulphide ions indicating bacterial contamination.

projects.title: Study of the methods of purification of water
projects.details: Investigation into various techniques used for purifying water sources.

projects.title: Testing the hardness, presence of Iron, Fluoride, Chloride, etc., in drinking water
projects.details: Regional variation study of ions in drinking water and analysis of causes for presence above permissible limits.

projects.title: Investigation of the foaming capacity of different washing soaps
projects.details: Study on the effect of adding Sodium carbonate on the foaming capacity of various washing soaps.

projects.title: Study the acidity of different samples of tea leaves
projects.details: Analysis of acidity levels in various tea leaf samples.

projects.title: Determination of the rate of evaporation of different liquids
projects.details: Experimental study comparing evaporation rates across different liquid types.

projects.title: Study the effect of acids and bases on the tensile strength of fibers
projects.details: Investigation into how acidic and basic environments affect the structural integrity of fibers.

projects.title: Study of acidity of fruit and vegetable juices
projects.details: Analysis of pH levels in various fruit and vegetable juice samples.

practicals.title: Cutting glass tube and glass rod
practicals.details: Basic laboratory skill involving cutting glass tubes and rods safely.

practicals.title: Bending a glass tube
practicals.details: Technique for bending glass tubes to specific shapes for laboratory use.

practicals.title: Drawing out a glass jet
practicals.details: Process of drawing out a glass tube to create a fine jet for experiments.

practicals.title: Boring a cork
practicals.details: Skill in creating holes in corks to fit glass tubes or thermometers.

practicals.title: Determination of melting point of an organic compound
practicals.unit_name: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
practicals.details: Experimental determination of the melting point to characterize an organic substance.

practicals.title: Determination of boiling point of an organic compound
practicals.unit_name: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
practicals.details: Experimental determination of the boiling point to characterize an organic substance.

practicals.title: Crystallization of impure sample (Alum, Copper Sulphate, or Benzoic Acid)
practicals.unit_name: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
practicals.details: Purification technique involving crystallization of specific impure samples.

practicals.title: Determination of pH using pH paper or universal indicator
practicals.details: Determining the pH of fruit juices, acids, bases, and salts using indicators.

practicals.title: Comparing pH of strong and weak acids
practicals.details: Comparative study of pH levels in solutions of strong and weak acids of same concentration.

practicals.title: Study the pH change in titration using universal indicator
practicals.details: Observing pH changes during the titration of a strong base.

practicals.title: Study the pH change by common-ion in weak acids and bases
practicals.details: Investigation into the effect of common ions on the pH of weak acid and base solutions.

practicals.title: Study shift in equilibrium between ferric ions and thiocyanate ions
practicals.details: Observing the shift in equilibrium by varying the concentration of either ion.

practicals.title: Study shift in equilibrium between [Co(H2O)6] and chloride ions
practicals.details: Observing the shift in equilibrium by changing the concentration of either ion.

practicals.title: Using mechanical/electronic balance for Quantitative Estimation
practicals.details: Fundamental skill in using balances for accurate mass measurement.

practicals.title: Preparation of standard solution of Oxalic acid
practicals.details: Creating a standard solution of oxalic acid for titration purposes.

practicals.title: Determination of strength of Sodium hydroxide by titration with Oxalic acid
practicals.details: Volumetric analysis to find the concentration of a given NaOH solution.

practicals.title: Preparation of standard solution of Sodium carbonate
practicals.details: Creating a standard solution of sodium carbonate for titration.

practicals.title: Determination of strength of Hydrochloric acid by titration with Sodium Carbonate
practicals.details: Volumetric analysis to find the concentration of a given HCl solution.

practicals.title: Determination of one anion and one cation in a given salt
practicals.details: Identification of specific cations (e.g., Pb, Cu, Al, Fe, Mn, Ni, Zn, Co, Ca, Sr, Ba, Mg, NH4) and anions (e.g., CO3, S, SO3, NO3, NO2, Cl, Br, I, SO4, PO4, CH3COO) in a salt sample.

practicals.title: Detection of Nitrogen, Sulphur, Chlorine in organic compounds
practicals.details: Chemical tests to detect the presence of nitrogen, sulphur, and chlorine in organic substances.
